org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.property

Class TablePropertyEditorView

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.view.View
      • android.view.ViewGroup
        • android.widget.LinearLayout
          • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.property.PropertyEditorView
            • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.property.TablePropertyEditorView
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.graphics.drawable.Drawable.Callback, android.view.accessibility.AccessibilityEventSource, android.view.KeyEvent.Callback, android.view.ViewManager, android.view.ViewParent
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FigurePropertyEditorView

    public abstract class TablePropertyEditorView
extends PropertyEditorView
    Abstract implementation of a property editor inside a fragment.
    Version:
    $Name$ $Revision$ $Date$
    Author:
    $Author: galland$
    Maven Group Id:
    $GroupId$
    Maven Artifact Id:
    $ArtifactId$

      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      protected static class  TablePropertyEditorView.BooleanEditor
      Wrapper to a CheckBox or a ImageView depending the editable flag.
      protected static class  TablePropertyEditorView.ColorEditor
      Wrapper to a ColorButton or a TextView depending the editable flag.
      protected static class  TablePropertyEditorView.ComboEditor<T>
      Wrapper to a Spinner or a TextView depending the editable flag.

      protected static class  TablePropertyEditorView.TextEditor
      Wrapper to a TextEdit or a TextView depending the editable flag.

      Create a view to edit properties with only the android application package and this ApkLib package in the list of package names.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TablePropertyEditorView

        protected TablePropertyEditorView(android.content.Context context)
        Create a view to edit properties with only the android application package and this ApkLib package in the list of package names.
        Parameters:
        context -

      • TablePropertyEditorView

        protected TablePropertyEditorView(android.content.Context context,
                       List<String> packageNames)
        Create a view to edit properties with a list of package names.

        The list of package names is used to retreive the labels of the properties in the Android resources.

        The application package is automatically added at the first position of the given list of package names. The package of this apklib is added at the end of the list.

        Parameters:
        context -
        packageNames - is the list of the package names from which the label resources may be retreived.

      • getComboEditor

        protected final <T> TablePropertyEditorView.ComboEditor<T> getComboEditor(String fieldId,
                                                        Class<T> type)
        Replies the color editor with the given id and of the given type.
        Type Parameters:
        T - is the type of the elements in the combo.
        Parameters:
        fieldId - is the identifier of the field.
        type - is the type of the elements in the combo.
        Returns:
        the view or null.

      • addStringField

        protected final TablePropertyEditorView.TextEditor addStringField(String label,
                                                String fieldId,
                                                String value)
        Add a field in the editor that permits to enter a string.
        Parameters:
        label - is the label associated with the field.
        fieldId - is the identifier of the field.
        value - is the value in the field.
        Returns:
        the edition view.

      • addIntegerField

        protected final TablePropertyEditorView.TextEditor addIntegerField(String label,
                                                 String fieldId,
                                                 boolean isPositiveOnly,
                                                 long value)
        Add a field in the editor that permits to enter an integer.
        Parameters:
        label - is the label associated with the field.
        fieldId - is the identifier of the field.
        isPositiveOnly - indicates if only the positives numbers are supported.
        value - is the value in the field.
        Returns:
        the edition view.

        value - is the value in the field.

      • addComboField

        protected final <T> TablePropertyEditorView.ComboEditor<T> addComboField(String label,
                                                       String fieldId,
                                                       List<T> choices,
                                                       T value)
        Add a field in the editor that permits to enter a value with a combo.
        Type Parameters:
        T - is the type of the choices.
        Parameters:
        label - is the label associated with the field.
        fieldId - is the identifier of the field.
        choices - are the possible choices in the combo.
        value - is the value in the field.
        Returns:
        the edition view.

      • getEditedProperties

        public Map<String,Object> getEditedProperties()
        Replies the properties in the fragment.
        Specified by:
        getEditedProperties in class PropertyEditorView
        Returns:
        the properties.
